description: Letter from Dūnash b. Yiṣḥaq from Tripoli (Libya) to Yiṣḥaq b. Barhūn al-Tāhartī, Fustat. Around 1030. Describes imagery or exaggerated event, of an attack against the ship, which the writer was traveling, before the ship entered the port of Tripoli. The attack, according to the story, ended when the attackers were defeated. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #204) VMR
description_he: מכתב מדונש בן יצחק, מטריפולי, ליצחק בן ברהון אל-טאהרתי, פוסטאט, כ-1030, על תיאור מתקפה על ספינה ליד נמל טריפולי
